# Autogenerated File Contracts

Preserve these exact autogenerated artifact names, relative paths, and structures.

## Directory

```text
~/.cursor/.orchestrator/<req>-<guid>-<date>/
```

## Files

```text
~/.cursor/.orchestrator/<req>-<guid>-<date>/spec-<req>-<guid>-<date>.md
~/.cursor/.orchestrator/<req>-<guid>-<date>/plan-<req>-<guid>-<date>.md
~/.cursor/.orchestrator/<req>-<guid>-<date>/progress-<req>-<guid>-<date>.md
```

## Rules

- Do not rename these files.
- Do not change the relative path shape.
- Do not translate placeholders.
- Do not change the internal section order of the plan or progress file templates.
- Use the exact structures in:
  - [plan-template.md](plan-template.md)
  - [progress-file-template.md](progress-file-template.md)
